descriptionEn: Name means "hearing" or "God hears my prayer." He is the son of Juda in Luke's genealogy, a Judahite and ancestor of Jesus Christ. Also spelled "Symeon" (KJV).

verses.line: Which was the son of Simeon, which was the son of Juda, which was the son of Joseph, which was the son of Jonan, which was the son of Eliakim,
